overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through Night City's downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting neon lights, towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows, and large holographic advertisements in a foggy cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide illuminated stairs

agents.ego_description: running up the concrete stairs toward the building entrance above

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with embedded lighting along the edges
tall building with illuminated windows against the night sky
glowing green holographic advertisement floating near the building entrance
concrete architectural overhang sheltering the stairway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a wide illuminated stairway in a futuristic city. The camera follows a character ascending the stairs toward a building entrance, with a green holographic advertisement visible ahead and glass skyscrapers towering in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with corporate building entrance

events.description: exits stairway into open street plaza with Arasaka building visible
red sports car drives past from left to right across the plaza

agents.ego_description: running across the wet asphalt plaza toward the corporate building entrance

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the plaza from left to right

entered.detail: massive brutalist corporate building with Arasaka signage
overhead structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
tall modern street light illuminating the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a wide urban plaza dominated by the Arasaka corporate building. The wet asphalt reflects neon lights as a red sports car drives past, and the camera moves toward the building entrance under large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under building overpass with digital signage

events.description: enters covered area under building overpass with reduced sky visibility
character turns right at the intersection under the overpass

agents.ego_description: running along the covered street and turning right at the corner

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the left side of the street

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street
short yellow-topped posts lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a building overpass where the sky is mostly obscured, passing beneath digital billboards. A yellow taxi drives past as the character turns right at the intersection, continuing through the covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced pedestrian walkway alongside corporate buildings

events.description: passing by chain-link fence on left side of walkway
character continues straight past security gate structure

agents.ego_description: running along the fenced walkway passing a pedestrian in colorful clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful jacket walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: metal security fence running along the left side of the path
large metal gate structure with warning lights
tall digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrower walkway bordered by a chain-link fence on the left, passing a security gate ahead. A pedestrian in bright clothing walks toward the camera, and vertical digital billboards illuminate the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor between industrial buildings

events.description: enters darker corridor with significantly reduced lighting
turns right emerging from dark corridor into open area

agents.ego_description: running through the dark service corridor and turning right toward the plaza

entered.detail: building with illuminated rectangular windows showing interior lights
security fence topped with barbed wire running along the path
narrow passage between industrial structures with wet concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a darker, more enclosed service corridor between industrial buildings with barbed wire fencing. The lighting is significantly dimmer here, with only the building windows providing illumination, before turning right to exit the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with panoramic city skyline view

events.description: emerges from corridor into wide open plaza with skyscraper views
fog density increases reducing visibility of distant towers

agents.ego_description: running across the open plaza toward the illuminated downtown skyscrapers

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with countless lit windows
massive floating advertisement displaying a human figure
stationary vehicle parked along the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast open plaza with a panoramic view of the city's illuminated skyline. Massive holographic billboards float in the air as fog rolls through the scene, partially obscuring the distant towers while the character runs across the wet concrete toward the downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city that transitions from a structured corporate entrance into a claustrophobic industrial corridor before opening into a vast, fog-shrouded skyline. It begins at the base of an illuminated stairway, following a character upward toward glass skyscrapers and a green holographic advertisement. As the character emerges into a wide urban plaza, the scene shifts to wet asphalt reflecting neon lights and the imposing Arasaka building, moving under a dark overpass where digital billboards and passing taxis define the covered corridor. The path then narrows into a walkway bordered by chain-link fences and security gates before dipping into a dim, enclosed service corridor flanked by barbed wire and industrial buildings. Finally, the camera breaks out of the darkness into a massive open plaza, where the character runs across wet concrete toward a panoramic view of the downtown district under floating holographic billboards and rolling fog.
